creator: discipline@tiscali.it
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #4)
I'm getting errors while updating emulators/wine on FreeBSD 14.3-STABLE amd64 after this commit:

pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/emulators/wine/work/stage/usr/local/share/man/de.UTF-8/man1/wine.1.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/emulators/wine/work/stage/usr/local/share/man/fr.UTF-8/man1/wine.1.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/emulators/wine/work/stage/usr/local/share/man/man1/wine.1.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/emulators/wine/work/stage/usr/local/share/man/pl.UTF-8/man1/wine.1.gz:No such file or directory
